title: Ideas
empty: No ideas yet. Be the first to share one!

list.emptyMine: You haven't shared any ideas yet

q1.heading: What do you need?
q1.helper: Describe what you need, what's frustrating you, or what you'd like to improve.
q1.placeholder: e.g. I'd love a way to export my reports without having to download them manually every time...

q2.heading: Why is this important to you?
q2.helper: Does it save time, reduce errors, help customers, or something else?
q2.placeholder: e.g. It takes me 30 minutes every Friday to do this manually. It feels like wasted time...

q3.heading: Do you have an idea of how this could work?
q3.helper: No pressure — even a rough sketch of an idea helps.
q3.placeholder: e.g. Maybe a button in the dashboard that generates a PDF automatically...

q4.heading: Where do you think this belongs?
q4.helper: If you're not sure, that's totally fine — just pick "Not sure yet".

review.heading: Looks good!
review.helper: Here's what you're sharing. You can go back and change anything.

bug.message: This sounds like it might be a bug.
bug.subtext: If something's broken or not working as expected, our support team can help you faster.

help.message: Sounds like you need some help.
help.subtext: If you have a question or need guidance, our help section might have what you're looking for.

detail.supportersStatement_zero: No one has supported this yet — be the first
detail.noConversation: No conversation yet. Share what you think about this idea.
detail.sentToClickUp: User story sent to ClickUp successfully
detail.clickUpError: Failed to send to ClickUp. Please try again.
